headline: Robinhood’s Trump Accounts Role Adds Long Term Savings Angle For Investors
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has been selected by the U.S. Treasury to serve as brokerage and initial trustee for the new government-backed Trump Accounts savings program for children. The program will cover children born between 2025 and 2028 and includes a dedicated app that Robinhood will help design and operate for families. BNY Mellon will work alongside Robinhood, while Trump Accounts are positioned as tax-advantaged savings vehicles with potential recurring account activity over...

headline: Coinbase downgraded at Barclays as weak crypto volumes pressure profitability
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays downgraded Coinbase shares to Underweight from Equal Weight, warning that weakening crypto trading volumes are squeezing the exchange’s profitability and that the stock offers little valuation support at current levels.
